headline: Last chance to file a claim in the Dollar General class action settlement
summary: The deadline to claim your portion of a multi-million dollar settlement involving Dollar General is on Monday, April 13.

headline: Uber & Ace Hardware Collaborate on Delivery Business: Upside in Store?
summary: UBER expands into home improvement as Ace Hardware's 3,700 stores join Uber Eats, pushing its retail delivery ambitions beyond food.

headline: DG Media Network to Introduce AI-Enabled In-Store Audio Network Across Thousands of Dollar General Stores
summary: Dollar General Corporation announced the planned rollout of an enhanced, AI-enabled in-store audio network across approximately 6,000 DG stores in 48 states. Through a new partnership with QSIC,...

headline: Dollar General’s media network rolls out AI store audio program
summary: The discount retailer is bringing the in-store media offering to about 6,000 locations through a new partnership with QSIC.
